sourceOfTruth: Current dirty worktree source audit on 2026-05-10 plus 2026-05-13 route-handler/direct API Jest evidence; MRA-E020 records the authoritative WSL focused local mocked telemetry/notification invocation pass; MRA-E021 records controlled Chromium admin-boundary and verification-admin journey passes; MRA-E022 records route-handler baseline plus live-server negative/status/header parity; MRA-E023 records local audit helper fail-open/error visibility proof; MRA-E024 records tracked migration SQL line audit and a related 8-suite / 74-test Jest pass while admin-auth .admin.spec.ts suites, ignored admin-host race, admin report/listing moderation browser coverage, authenticated admin signed-URL success, real storage/provider behavior, production/staging database migration-state proof, live browser/admin-operation audit failure injection, production observability delivery, provider telemetry, and database outage runtime proof remain unverified.

manifestItems.name: Migration inventory and SQL source audit

claims.claim: Report submission and private feedback are server-validated, auth-scoped, duplicate-protected, and constrained by private-feedback eligibility gates.
Admin user, listing, report, and verification actions require admin auth and use rate limits, row locks or state checks where relevant, audit logging, and revalidation.
Verification document access is admin-only, rate-limited, document-availability checked, audit-logged, and returned through a no-store signed URL redirect.
